description: Perceptually uniform color space by Björn Ottosson. Equal steps in L/a/b correspond to equal perceived differences. The gold standard for smooth gradients.
bad_for: nothing — this is the best general-purpose space for shader art
art_failure_modes: Interpolating in Oklab between very saturated colors can pass through desaturated mid-tones. Use Oklch for constant-chroma paths.
